description: Functional tests for update-primary-doc skill (table-driven sync)

tests.name: Reads Sync Rules table from CLAUDE.md
tests.description: Should parse Sync Rules table to understand mapping
setup:
cd /tmp/test-primary-doc-1 && cat > CLAUDE.md <<'EOF'
## Project Type

**Type:** custom
**Primary Document:** docs/vision.md

**Sync Rules:**
| Changed Files | Document Section | Update Type |
|---------------|------------------|-------------|
| docs/catalog/*.md | Projects | Add entries |
EOF
cd /tmp/test-primary-doc-1 && mkdir -p docs && echo '# Vision' > docs/vision.md

tests.name: Matches changed files against patterns
tests.description: Should match docs/catalog/project-a.md against docs/catalog/*.md pattern
setup:
cd /tmp/test-primary-doc-2 && cat > CLAUDE.md <<'EOF'
## Project Type

**Type:** custom
**Primary Document:** docs/vision.md

**Sync Rules:**
| Changed Files | Document Section | Update Type |
|---------------|------------------|-------------|
| docs/catalog/*.md | Section 2 Projects | Add/update entries |
EOF

tests.name: Proposes updates to specified section
tests.description: Should propose update to Section 2 when catalog file changes
setup:
cd /tmp/test-primary-doc-3 && cat > CLAUDE.md <<'EOF'
## Project Type

**Type:** custom
**Primary Document:** docs/vision.md

**Sync Rules:**
| Changed Files | Document Section | Update Type |
|---------------|------------------|-------------|
| docs/catalog/*.md | Section 2 Projects | Add entries |
EOF

cd /tmp/test-primary-doc-3 && cat > docs/vision.md <<'EOF'
# Vision

## Section 2 Projects
No projects yet
EOF

tests.name: Validates document after updates
tests.description: Should run validate_document.py after applying changes
setup:
cd /tmp/test-primary-doc-4 && cat > CLAUDE.md <<'EOF'
## Project Type

**Type:** custom
**Primary Document:** docs/thesis.md
EOF

tests.name: Blocks if validation fails
tests.description: Should revert changes if document corruption detected
